content.content:
I couldn't find an event with the exact title "Dental check-up," but I found an event that looks like it matches:

- Title: "Dentist Appointment"
- When: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour)
- ID: 5
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Description: "Regular dental check-up."
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com

Before I proceed, two quick clarifications so I do exactly what you want:

1) Is "Dentist Appointment" (ID 5) the event you want rescheduled to 2024-05-20 at 10:00 AM?
2) I don't have an email address for the clinic. Please provide the clinic's email address. I can either:
   - add the clinic as a participant to the event (they'll receive the calendar reschedule notification automatically), and/or
   - send a separate notification email to both you and the clinic about the new time.

Tell me how you'd like me to notify the clinic (add as participant, separate email, or both) and provide the clinic email, and I'll reschedule it keeping the same duration.
